name: Wolt Food Delivery and Merchant API
what_it_does: Wolt food delivery and merchant REST API for restaurant operators and enterprise food businesses to manage menus, receive orders, and control operations through Wolt's food and grocery delivery marketplace operating across 27 countries in Europe and Middle East — a DoorDash subsidiary acquired for $8.1B in 2022. Enables AI agents to manage menu catalog for restaurant item automation, handle order receipt for kitchen notification automation, access order state for delivery progress automation, retrieve venue status for availability management automation, manage POS integration for unified order management automation, handle menu category for item organization automation, access promotion management for restaurant marketing automation, retrieve analytics reporting for sales performance automation, manage multi-venue for restaurant chain operations automation, and integrate Wolt with POS systems, inventory management, and restaurant management platforms for end-to-end food delivery automation across Nordic and European markets.
use_cases: Receiving real-time Wolt orders for restaurant POS integration and kitchen automation agents
Managing menu items, prices, and availability for multi-location restaurant chain automation agents
Updating venue open/close status and item availability for restaurant operations automation agents
Accessing order history and sales analytics for restaurant performance management automation agents
not_for: Consumer food ordering apps (Wolt API is for merchant operators and technology partners only)
Markets outside Wolt's 27-country coverage (primarily Nordic/Eastern European/Middle East focus)
Physical retail without delivery component (Wolt is delivery-focused marketplace)
best_when: A restaurant operator, multi-location food chain, or POS vendor wanting AI agents to integrate with Wolt's food delivery marketplace for automated order management and menu control across Wolt's Nordic and European markets.
avoid_when: PARTNER PROGRAM REQUIRED: Wolt merchant API access requires Wolt restaurant partnership or technology partner approval; automated standalone self-service API assumption creates no API access; automated integration requires Wolt partnership agreement. ORDER HANDLING IS TIME-CRITICAL: Wolt orders have a response time SLA; automated slow order processing creates cancellation and partner score impact; automated must implement real-time webhook consumer for near-instant order acknowledgment. DOORDASH ACQUISITION INTEGRATION: Wolt is now DoorDash subsidiary; automated independent Wolt operations assumption should account for product convergence with DoorDash platform; automated long-term integrations should monitor for platform alignment changes. VENUE STATUS CRITICAL FOR DISCOVERY: Wolt venue status (open/closed, accepting orders) directly affects marketplace visibility; automated status management failure causes missed orders; automated must maintain accurate venue status synchronized with actual operations.

auth.notes: Wolt uses API key authentication for merchant and partner access. REST API with JSON. Helsinki, Finland HQ. Founded 2014 by Miki Kuusi. DoorDash subsidiary (acquired 2022, $8.1B). Products: Menu management, order management, venue management, analytics, POS integration. SDKs: None public. GDPR compliant. 27 countries across Europe and Middle East: FI, SE, NO, DK, EE, LV, LT, PL, CZ, SK, HU, RO, HR, SI, GR, IL, AZ, GE, KZ, and others. 35,000+ restaurant partners. Competes with Deliveroo and Foodora in Europe.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved merchant partners; production requires Wolt restaurant agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Restaurant commission: 20-30% per order; technology partner pricing: negotiated
pricing.notes: Helsinki FI. DoorDash subsidiary. Commission per order. Partnership required. GDPR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; order webhooks near real-time; menu APIs throttled per venue

known_agent_gotchas: ORDER RESPONSE TIME SLA REQUIRED: Wolt orders require acknowledgment within defined SLA window; automated slow order processing creates auto-cancellation and partner score penalty; automated must have near real-time webhook handler for order events

PARTNERSHIP REQUIRED FOR API ACCESS: Wolt merchant API is not publicly self-service; automated developer portal API key assumption creates no access; automated must obtain Wolt restaurant or technology partner agreement

MENU ITEM AVAILABILITY SYNC: Wolt item sold-out status must be proactively updated; automated static menu assumption without availability sync creates orders for unavailable items; automated must push availability updates when items run out

COUNTRY-SPECIFIC CONFIGURATION: Wolt operates across 27 countries with country-specific settings (currency, VAT, operating hours); automated single-country config applied globally creates locale errors; automated must configure per-country venue settings

DOORDASH PLATFORM CONVERGENCE: Wolt is DoorDash subsidiary and may align with DoorDash API standards over time; automated assumption of Wolt as fully independent platform creates integration fragility on platform updates; automated should monitor Wolt developer changelog
agent_readiness.security_notes: Food delivery marketplace. GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key. EU/Nordic. Customer order and delivery data. DoorDash subsidiary.

security_score_components.security_notes: Food delivery. GDPR, PCI-DSS. API key. EU/Nordic. Customer and order data.
